employee-rest-api-mastery.overview:
Production-quality employee API with DTOs, pagination, validation, Swagger docs, and proper status codes.

Features to build:
• Full CRUD with DTOs
• Pagination & Sorting
• Swagger Documentation
• Request Validation
• Standardized Error Responses

Requirements:
• RESTful endpoint design
• DTO pattern with mappers
• Swagger/OpenAPI
• Postman collection

Bonus:
• Department filter and search endpoints
employee-rest-api-mastery.explanation: Employee Management REST API is a expert-level project (Week 10). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Full CRUD with DTOs, Pagination & Sorting, Swagger Documentation, Request Validation, Standardized Error Responses.
employee-rest-api-mastery.youtubeLabel: Production REST API with Spring Boot
employee-rest-api-mastery.studyNote:
1. Watch the YouTube tutorial first.
2. Open the GitHub repo — clone or browse the source.
3. Build your version feature-by-feature in IntelliJ.
4. Test each feature before moving on.
5. Mark complete when your project works end-to-end.

hospital-rest-api-mastery.overview:
Hospital API with nested resources, versioning, and comprehensive documentation.

Features to build:
• Patient APIs
• Doctor APIs
• Appointment APIs
• Nested Resources
• API Versioning

Requirements:
• Nested resource URIs
• Generic response wrapper
• Swagger docs
• Health check endpoint

Bonus:
• v1 and v2 appointment endpoints

ecommerce-product-api.overview:
Product catalog API with search, filter, pagination, and rate limiting.

Features to build:
• Product CRUD
• Search & Filter
• Pagination
• Category Endpoints
• Rate Limiting

Requirements:
• Search and filter APIs
• Pagination with sorting
• Swagger documentation
• Proper HTTP status codes

Bonus:
• Product image metadata endpoints

crm-rest-api.overview:
Customer relationship management API with contacts, leads, and activity tracking.

Features to build:
• Contact Management
• Lead Tracking
• Activity Logs
• Search & Filter
• Full API Documentation

Requirements:

• OpenAPI spec
• Postman test suite

Bonus:

student-rest-api-mastery.overview:
Student API with validation, idempotency, correlation IDs, and production structure.

Features to build:
• Student CRUD
• Input Validation
• Idempotent POST
• Correlation ID Logging
• Swagger & Postman

Requirements:
• Bean validation on DTOs
• Standardized error responses
• Swagger docs
• Correlation ID in logs

Bonus:
• Course enrollment nested endpoints
